response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned fullstack engineer with 15+ years of experience, strong TypeScript and Node.js proficiency, and a current role explicitly involving AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling — a direct match for the job's most differentiating requirement. His experience with MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes covers the infrastructure side well, and his deep TDD culture (workshops, open-source testing libraries, explicit craftsmanship practices) aligns with the team's quality expectations. The main gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Kotlin experience, and React appears in only one role without depth indication.
strengths: Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript, Node.js, AI-agent infrastructure, and MCP/agentic tooling — the most differentiating requirement of this JD
Exceptionally strong testing culture: TDD advocacy, open-source test runner and assertion library for D, multiple testing workshops, and explicit use of TDD/CI/CD practices across roles
Broad, proven fullstack depth across 15+ years including cloud (AWS CDK), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), multiple databases (MongoDB, MySQL), and polyglot programming
concerns: No mention of Nest.js anywhere in the resume, despite it being the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin is absent from skills and employment history, and the secondary Java exposure is dated and limited to robotics/tooling contexts
React experience is surface-level — mentioned in a single role (Optilyz pricing team) with no depth indicators, and the personal project stack favors Ember.js
